PlatinumIntegration.// PositionsSource: Set to 'Db' in production to read positions from the legacy Payroll_Position table via EF. Defaults to 'Mock' for safety. The Development override (appsettings.Development.json) sets this to 'Db' against the dev Postgres database.
PlatinumIntegration.// EmployeesSource: Set to 'Db' in production to read employees from the legacy Payroll_Employee table via EF. Defaults to 'Mock' for safety. The Development override (appsettings.Development.json) sets this to 'Db' against the dev Postgres database.
